appSubtitle: Apply for financial assistance through a secure and guided multi-step application process.

formPlaceholder: Multi-step application form will be implemented here.

personalInfo.subtitle: Please provide your personal details below.

familyFinancial.subtitle: Please provide your family and financial details below.

situation.subtitle: Please describe your current situation. Use the AI assistant to help you write if needed.

aiAssistant.suggestionHint: You can edit the suggestion below before accepting it.

errors.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: Invalid API key. Please contact support.
errors.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

form.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.successMessage: Your application has been received. We will review it and get back to you soon.
